message:
feat(e2e): add E2E tests for ntm checkpoint and rollback

Comprehensive test coverage for session save/resume workflow:
- Checkpoint save with descriptions and custom scrollback
- Checkpoint list (empty, after save)
- Checkpoint show details
- Checkpoint delete with --force
- Checkpoint verify integrity
- Checkpoint export to archive
- --no-git flag for skipping git state
- Rollback dry-run mode
- Error handling for non-existent sessions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
